name: Gazpacho (Cook)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all ingredients into a container of an electric blender.
2. Add the ingredients in the order listed above.
3. Cover and blend at high speed for 5-10 seconds or until the ingredients are finely chopped.
4. Chill thoroughly.
5. Serve, optionally accompanied by side dishes of chopped cucumber, green onion, green pepper, tomatoes, and croutons.
